speaker: BJ Fogg
episode_or_content_title: Tiny Habits: The Small Changes That Change Everything
verification_notes: Created 2026-05-26 via the Six-State Buildout (Phase 8 human-gated promotion). prototype_only reconstruction — paraphrase of the speaker's documented idea; NOT a verified verbatim excerpt. BJ Fogg, PhD, directs the Behavior Design Lab at Stanford University and is the author of the New York Times bestseller "Tiny Habits: The Small Changes That Change Everything" (2019). The TEDxFremont talk "Forget big change, start with a tiny habit" is an official TED-affiliated event; full transcript available at singjupost.com. The official book/site: tinyhabits.com. The "you already know how to floss all your teeth — what you're lacking is the automaticity" framing is confirmed verbatim from the TEDxFremont transcript (singjupost.com/forget-big-change-start-tiny- habit-bj-fogg-transcript/). Tier-1 credibility (published researcher). Quote type: paraphrase incorporating verified key framing from the public transcript; would upgrade to verbatim with a direct fetch of a continuous block.
